title: Frontend Engineer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking a skilled Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a mid-level engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality web applications using React, Redux, and Node.js. You will work closely with our design team to translate designs into functional and visually appealing user interfaces.

Responsibilities:
- Develop responsive web applications using React, Redux, and Node.js
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing user interfaces
- Write clean, modular, and well-documented code
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues in a timely manner
- Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend development trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- React
- Redux
- Node.js
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- HTML/CSS
- Webpack
- Jest

Nice to have:
- Angular.js
- GraphQL
- CI/CD
